features.name: Follow-Up Email v2 — Quality + Demo Polish
Skill Gold Standard Upgrade — Top 10 Sales Skills
Landing Page Builder — Dedicated UI Screen
Landing Builder v2 — Agent Teams + Gemini SVGs

stories.title: Enrich analysis object with sentiment, key topics, and buying signals
acceptance: Meeting SELECT in generate-follow-up/index.ts includes sentiment_score, sentiment_reasoning, and summary_oneliner
Analysis object populates sentiment field from sentiment_score: positive (>0.5), neutral (-0.5 to 0.5), challenging (<-0.5)
Key topics extracted from summary via simple keyword extraction and populated in analysis.keyTopics
Buying signals extracted from summary (budget mentions, timeline confirmations, stakeholder buy-in) populated in analysis.buyingSignals
Composer prompt receives populated sentiment, keyTopics, and buyingSignals instead of empty defaults

stories.title: Add regenerate-with-guidance flow (backend + frontend)
acceptance: POST endpoint accepts optional regenerate_guidance string and cached_rag_context object
When guidance provided, re-composes email with same RAG context plus user instructions appended to prompt
Frontend shows text input modal when Regenerate button is clicked
Regenerated email replaces previous result with a 'Regenerated' badge
No re-query of RAG — uses cached context from first generation (saves credits and time)

stories.title: Render email as styled preview with subject header and signature
acceptance: Email result renders in a Card with email-client styling: To field, bold subject line, body with proper paragraphs
Signature (sender name) rendered in muted text below body, visually separated
Markdown-style formatting (bold with **, bullet lists) parsed and rendered as HTML
Links in email body rendered as clickable blue text
Word count shown below email in muted text

stories.title: Add inline email editor with edit/preview toggle
acceptance: Edit button on email preview switches to editable textarea for body and input for subject
Preview button returns to styled read-only view with edited content
Edited content persists in state — Copy button copies edited version
Cancel button reverts to original generated content
Edit state does not re-trigger generation

stories.title: Add Send to Slack approval button with preview block
acceptance: Send to Slack button on demo page calls generate-follow-up with delivery='slack'
Backend formats email as Slack Block Kit message with approve/edit/dismiss buttons
Sends to user's Slack DM channel via slack-events bot
UI shows confirmation toast: 'Sent to Slack for approval'
If Slack not connected, button is disabled with tooltip explaining setup

stories.title: Show actual RAG findings in context breakdown, not just counts
acceptance: Context breakdown expands to show actual findings: commitment text, concern keywords, commercial mentions
Each context category is collapsible with a chevron toggle
Collapsed state shows count badge, expanded shows 2-3 line summaries per category
Empty categories hidden (not shown as '0 found')
Backend SSE result event includes ragSummary object with category labels and snippet text

stories.title: Add step timing display and total generation time
acceptance: Each SSE step event includes durationMs field calculated from step start to complete
Frontend displays duration next to each completed step: 'Loading attendees (0.3s)'
Total generation time shown below all steps after completion
Steps that were skipped show 'skipped' instead of a duration
Running steps show elapsed time counter updating every 500ms

stories.title: Add quality degradation warnings in generation metadata
acceptance: SSE result event includes warnings array listing what degraded: missing writing style, no sentiment, RAG partial results, placeholder attendee
Each warning has a severity (info/warn) and human-readable message
Frontend renders warnings as amber badges below the context breakdown
Warnings are informational only — generation still completes
No warnings shown when all data sources returned successfully

stories.title: Upgrade copilot-proposal: add references/, RAG integration, competitive context
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: deal + company enrichment + contact intel + interaction history (RAG) + pricing strategy
references/proposal-templates.md added with templates by deal stage (discovery, evaluation, negotiation, renewal) — annotated good vs bad examples
references/pricing-strategy.md added with 3-tier anchoring framework, discount guidelines, competitive pricing context
Instructions include RAG queries: 'pricing discussions with {company}', 'objections about cost from {contact}', 'ROI mentioned in meetings'
Output contract expanded: pricing_rationale, competitive_positioning, roi_metrics, personalization_signals fields added

stories.title: Upgrade copilot-followup: add references/, RAG transcript context, multi-threading
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: contact + deal context + meeting RAG (commitments, decisions, concerns) + activity signals + email strategy
references/followup-templates.md added with templates by type: post-discovery, post-demo, post-proposal, post-negotiation, re-engagement — with annotated examples
references/personalization-guide.md added with value-add strategies by deal stage, multi-threading guidance (when to switch contacts), send timing research
Instructions include RAG queries: 'commitments made to {contact}', 'concerns raised by {company}', 'next steps discussed'
Output contract expanded: rag_context_used, personalization_signals (min 3), multi_thread_suggestion, confidence_level fields added

stories.title: Upgrade copilot-battlecard: add references/, web search enrichment, win theme framework
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: competitor profile + deal-specific positioning + web research (news, pricing, reviews) + RAG (competitor mentions in calls) + win strategy
references/battlecard-frameworks.md added with ABD response templates, feature comparison matrix format, pricing position guide, strength confidence levels
references/competitive-intel-guide.md added with web research methodology, review site extraction patterns, how to handle when competitor is actually stronger
Instructions include RAG queries: '{competitor} mentioned in meetings with {company}', 'competitive objections from {contact}'
Output contract expanded: evidence_confidence (high/medium/low per claim), timing_guidance (when to surface which win theme), deal_specific_angles

stories.title: Upgrade copilot-objection: add references/, RAG pattern matching, proof point library
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: objection classification + contact/deal context + RAG (how this objection was handled before) + competitive context + response strategy

references/objection-playbooks.md added with detailed playbooks for all 7 categories (Price, Timing, Competition, Status Quo, Authority, Need, Trust) — each with 3-5 response templates, bridge questions, proof points
references/response-patterns.md added with ACE framework deep dive, multi-turn handling (objection to your response), fake objection detection, when to concede vs push back
Instructions include RAG queries: 'objections from {contact}', 'how {objection_type} was resolved', 'proof points used for {industry}'
Output contract expanded: objection_category, confidence_this_is_real_concern, historical_success_rate, escalation_recommendation fields

stories.title: Upgrade copilot-chase: add references/, silence-duration templates, multi-channel strategy
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: contact + deal health/ghost risk + RAG (last real conversation context) + activity decay signals + re-engagement strategy
references/chase-templates.md added with templates by silence duration (7-day, 14-day, 21-day, 30+ day) — each with 3 tone variants and annotated examples of great vs mediocre re-engagement emails
references/reengagement-playbook.md added with multi-channel escalation, pattern detection, value-add library by deal stage
Instructions include RAG queries: 'last substantive conversation with {contact}', 'commitments {contact} made', 'topics {contact} engaged with'
Output contract expanded: silence_analysis, channel_recommendation, multi_thread_option, rag_context_used, confidence_level, escalation_path

stories.title: Upgrade sales-sequence: add RAG win/loss context, CRM history integration, adaptive timing
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: contact enrichment + company research + competitive angles + RAG (win/loss patterns by vertical) + sequence strategy
Existing references/ enhanced: frameworks.md updated with RAG-informed personalization section, cold-email-playbook.md updated with data-driven timing guidance
references/sequence-analytics.md added with performance benchmarks, adaptive timing logic (adjust Day X based on industry/seniority), A/B testing methodology with measurement criteria
Instructions include RAG queries: 'what worked for {industry} prospects', 'why we won/lost deals with {company_type}', 'objections from {seniority_level} contacts'
Output contract expanded: sequence_confidence, personalization_depth_score, competitive_angle_used, timing_rationale fields

stories.title: Upgrade deal-next-best-actions: add worked examples, manager escalation logic, action dependencies
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: deal health + contact engagement + RAG (what actions moved similar deals) + competitive threats + capacity-aware strategy
references/action-library.md enhanced with worked CVHS score calculation examples, annotated real-world action sequences showing before/after deal movement
references/stage-playbooks.md enhanced with manager escalation decision tree, action dependency chains (do X before Y), tie-breaking logic for same-score actions
Instructions include RAG queries: 'what advanced deals at {stage}', 'actions that worked for {deal_size} deals', 'engagement patterns before deals closed'
Output contract expanded: action_dependencies, escalation_recommendation, historical_success_signal, rep_preference_adjustment fields

stories.title: Upgrade lead-qualification: add web research, behavioral signals, enrichment chaining
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: lead data + company web research (funding, tech stack, hiring) + contact enrichment (AI Ark/Apollo) + CRM relationship history + qualification strategy
references/scoring-frameworks.md enhanced with web-research-informed scoring (tech stack match, funding stage, hiring signals), behavioral data integration guidance
references/icp-templates.md enhanced with vertical-specific ICP examples (SaaS, healthcare, fintech, agency), enrichment chaining workflow (lead → AI Ark → Apollo → score)
Instructions include web search queries: '{company} funding', '{company} tech stack', '{company} hiring' and enrichment tool calls for contact depth
Output contract expanded: enrichment_data_used, web_research_signals, tech_stack_match, funding_stage_fit, behavioral_score fields

stories.title: Upgrade daily-focus-planner: add historical pattern analysis, action clustering, daily rhythm
acceptance: SKILL.md rewritten with 5-layer data model: pipeline health + contact staleness + RAG (what actions moved deals this week) + competitive threats + capacity-aware daily plan

references/focus-frameworks.md enhanced with Focusing Question deep dive, action clustering methodology (group calls, group emails, group research), recommended daily rhythm (morning = outbound, afternoon = follow-up)
references/capacity-guide.md enhanced with historical pattern learning (if rep ignores call actions, suggest emails), non-completion tracking, weekly trend analysis
Instructions include RAG queries: 'deals that advanced this week', 'actions completed vs skipped', 'engagement changes in last 7 days'
Output contract expanded: action_clusters, recommended_rhythm, pattern_insights, weekly_trend_comparison fields

stories.title: Upgrade post-meeting-followup-pack-builder: add meeting outcome confidence, consistency checking
acceptance: SKILL.md enhanced with meeting outcome confidence scoring (how certain are we about each decision/commitment extracted)
references/pack-templates.md enhanced with templates by meeting type (discovery, demo, negotiation, renewal) — currently generic
references/artifact-examples.md enhanced with cross-pack consistency checking (does this follow-up align with last meeting's follow-up?)
Instructions include RAG queries: 'previous follow-up packs for {company}', 'commitments tracking for {deal}' to ensure consistency across touchpoints
Output contract expanded: decision_confidence_scores, consistency_check (vs previous pack), stripped_down_option (when meeting lacked clear decisions)

stories.title: Validate all 10 upgraded skills pass sync-skills validation and token budgets
acceptance: scripts/validate-skills.ts passes for all 10 upgraded skills (valid frontmatter, required fields, token budget under 5000)
scripts/sync-skills.ts --dry-run shows all 10 skills would sync successfully with references/ loaded
Each skill's references/ files are under individual file size limits and total combined skill+refs under token budget
No broken YAML frontmatter, no missing required fields, no orphaned references
Output contracts for all 10 skills have consistent structure (status, data, references, meta fields)

stories.title: Sync all 10 upgraded skills to organization_skills table with embeddings
acceptance: scripts/sync-skills.ts run successfully syncs all 10 skills to organization_skills table
All references/ documents loaded into skill_documents table with doc_type='reference'
Embeddings generated for all 10 updated skill descriptions via generate-embedding edge function
Semantic routing test: each skill routes correctly from natural language queries at confidence >= 0.6
Lazy-loading confirmed: autonomousExecutor loads metadata only at init, full content on first execution

stories.title: Create types and useLandingBuilderState hook
acceptance: types.ts defines PhaseStatus, BuilderPhase, PhaseDeliverable, LandingBuilderState, LandingPageGateData interfaces
useLandingBuilderState hook derives phase state from CopilotMessage[] via useMemo
Phase detection heuristics identify phase completions from assistant message content and structured responses
Hook returns { phases, currentPhase, deliverables, isExpressMode, skippedPhases }
TypeScript strict compliance — no any types

stories.title: Create page route, wrapper component, and register routes
acceptance: LandingPageBuilderPage.tsx implements URL-based conversation routing (mirrors CopilotPage pattern)
LandingPageBuilder.tsx wraps CopilotLayout with custom right panel and AssistantShell
lazyPages.tsx exports LandingPageBuilderPage via lazyWithRetry
App.tsx registers /landing-page-builder and /landing-page-builder/:conversationId routes with InternalRouteGuard + AppLayout
Route loads without errors and redirects base path to /:conversationId

stories.title: Build LandingBuilderEmpty welcome state with starter cards
acceptance: LandingBuilderEmpty.tsx renders welcome state with heading, pipeline diagram, and 4 starter cards
Cards: Start from scratch, I have a brief, I have style + copy, Just build it
Each card calls onStart(seedPrompt) with appropriate pre-crafted prompt
Responsive layout: 2x2 grid on desktop, stack on mobile
Uses project design system (Card, Button from shadcn/ui)

stories.title: Build PhaseTimeline vertical stepper component
acceptance: PhaseTimeline.tsx renders 6 phases as vertical stepper with status icons (CheckCircle2, Circle, RefreshCw)
Status colors: complete=green, active=blue pulsing, pending=gray dimmed, iterating=amber
Each phase shows name and skill attribution label
Click on completed phase triggers onPhaseClick callback
Active phase has subtle animation (pulse or glow)

stories.title: Build right panel with deliverable preview and session info
acceptance: LandingBuilderRightPanel.tsx has 3 CollapsibleSections: Phase Timeline, Current Deliverable, Session
DeliverablePreview.tsx renders condensed preview per phase type (section list, wireframe thumbnail, color swatches, headline preview, image grid, file list)
Session section shows duration and New Project button
Panel width matches CopilotRightPanel (320px, collapsible)
Integrates PhaseTimeline component in first section

stories.title: Build ApprovalGate response component with approve/iterate/go-back actions
acceptance: ApprovalGate.tsx renders phase completion card with Approve, Iterate, Go Back buttons
Approve sends 'Approved. Proceed to Phase {N+1}.' as user message via onActionClick
Iterate opens inline text input for feedback, sends as user message
Go Back sends 'Go back to Phase {N-1}.' as user message
After user responds, gate becomes read-only showing the chosen action

stories.title: Wire AssistantShell emptyComponent prop and CopilotResponse router
acceptance: AssistantShell.tsx accepts optional emptyComponent prop, renders it instead of CopilotEmpty when provided
CopilotResponse.tsx adds 'landing_page_gate' case routing to ApprovalGate component
types.ts in copilot/ adds LandingPageGateData to CopilotResponseType union
LandingPageBuilder passes LandingBuilderEmpty as emptyComponent to AssistantShell
Full flow verified: navigate to /landing-page-builder → empty state → send message → chat loads

stories.title: Integration verification and end-to-end flow testing
acceptance: Route loads: /landing-page-builder redirects to /landing-page-builder/{uuid} and shows custom empty state
Empty state works: clicking starter card sends seed prompt and copilot begins Phase 1
Phase detection works: right panel updates phase status as conversation progresses
Approval gate renders: Approve/Iterate/Go Back buttons appear at phase boundaries
TypeScript build passes with no errors (npx tsc --noEmit)

stories.title: Create landing_builder_sessions table with workspace schema
acceptance: Migration creates landing_builder_sessions with id, conversation_id, user_id, org_id columns
JSONB columns: brief, strategy, copy, visuals, code (nullable)
Integer current_phase, JSONB phase_status, timestamps
RLS policies: users can CRUD own sessions, org members can read
Unique constraint on conversation_id

stories.title: Create generate-svg edge function with Gemini 3.1 Pro
acceptance: Edge function accepts { description, brand_colors, complexity, viewbox? }
Calls Gemini 3.1 Pro (gemini-3.1-pro-preview) with thinking budgets: simple=2048, medium=8192, complex=16384
Uses prompt templates from gemini-svg-guide.md (narrative/sequential for hero, general for sections)
Returns { svg_code, description } with validated SVG (viewBox, xmlns, no SMIL, CSS @keyframes only)
Proper error handling, CORS via getCorsHeaders(req), JWT-protected

stories.title: Build workspace service (CRUD + React hooks)
acceptance: landingBuilderWorkspaceService.ts with create, get, update, updatePhaseOutput methods
useLandingBuilderWorkspace hook wraps service with React Query (auto-refetch on mutations)
TypeScript interface LandingBuilderWorkspace matching DB schema exactly
Optimistic updates for phase transitions (instant UI, async DB write)
maybeSingle() for session lookup by conversation_id

stories.title: Refactor LandingPageBuilder to use workspace state instead of refs
acceptance: LandingPageBuilder reads/writes phase outputs via workspace service instead of phaseOutputsRef
Phase transitions update workspace.current_phase and workspace.phase_status
builderApiTransform reads from workspace (brief, strategy, copy, visuals) instead of accumulated context
Each agent reads ONLY what it needs from workspace (token-efficient)
Session resumes correctly on page refresh (workspace loaded from DB)

stories.title: Implement Strategist agent: brief enrichment + company research
acceptance: Strategist system prompt focuses on landing page strategy, conversion psychology, competitor analysis
After DiscoveryWizard (5Q), Strategist asks 2-3 targeted follow-ups based on gaps in the brief
Uses gemini_research tool to analyze competitor websites and market positioning
Writes enriched brief + strategy + section_list to workspace
Agent badge shows '🎯 Strategist' on its messages in the chat

stories.title: Implement Copywriter agent: A/B copy per section from workspace
acceptance: Copywriter system prompt: direct-response copy expert, PAS/AIDA frameworks, specific to business
Reads strategy + section_list from workspace (NOT full accumulated context)
Produces A/B copy per section in exact markdown format for CopyPicker parsing
Writes selected copy back to workspace.copy after CopyPicker confirmation
Agent badge shows '✍️ Copywriter' on its messages

stories.title: Implement Visual Artist agent with parallel sub-tasks
acceptance: Visual Artist orchestrates 3 parallel tasks: (1) Claude palette/typography/icons, (2) Gemini SVGs, (3) Nano Banana hero
Gemini SVG generation calls generate-svg edge function with rich prompts (isometric, detailed, brand-colored)
Generates 2-3 SVGs per section using workspace.strategy.section_list
Nano Banana hero generation uses parseVisualsForImage with workspace brand colors
All visual assets written to workspace.visuals; agent badge shows '🎨 Visual Artist'

stories.title: Implement Builder agent: reads full workspace, outputs production code
acceptance: Builder system prompt: production React + Tailwind developer, never paraphrases approved content
Reads ALL workspace fields (brief, strategy, copy, visuals) to compose the final component
Embeds approved SVGs directly, uses exact hex colors, exact copy text, approved typography
Code renders in LandingCodePreview iframe (existing component)
Agent badge shows '⚙️ Builder' on its messages

stories.title: Add agent badges to ChatMessage and PhaseTimeline
acceptance: ChatMessage renders agent role badge (Strategist/Copywriter/Visual Artist/Builder) on assistant messages
Badge derived from message metadata (agentRole field) set by each agent
PhaseTimeline shows active agent name next to current phase
Visuals phase shows parallel progress: palette done, SVGs 2/3, hero generating
Badges are small, non-intrusive — role name in muted text above the message

stories.title: Reduce DiscoveryWizard to 5 questions + strategist probing
acceptance: DiscoveryWizard reduced from 7 to 5 questions (remove tone and sections — strategist infers these)
After wizard submit, Strategist agent asks 2-3 targeted follow-ups in the chat
Follow-ups are based on gaps: missing competitors, unclear audience, vague outcome
User responds in chat, Strategist incorporates answers into enriched brief
Strategist then produces strategy without further user input

stories.title: Integrate Gemini SVG previews into visuals phase UI
acceptance: Visuals phase shows SVG gallery: each section's SVG rendered via SvgPreview component
SVGs are labelled by section name (Hero accent, Features divider, CTA background)
User can approve/reject individual SVGs (rejected ones get regenerated)
Approved SVGs stored in workspace.visuals.svg_assets array
Loading state shows per-SVG progress (Gemini takes 10-20s per SVG)

stories.title: Create geminiSvgService for frontend Gemini SVG calls
acceptance: geminiSvgService.ts wraps generate-svg edge function with typed request/response
Supports batch generation: generateSvgBatch(descriptions[]) calls edge function in parallel
Validates returned SVG (has viewBox, has xmlns, no script tags) before returning
Handles errors gracefully: returns null + toast for failed generations
Uses supabase.functions.invoke for auth (inherits user JWT)

stories.title: End-to-end integration test: full pipeline with agent team
acceptance: Full flow: DiscoveryWizard → Strategist follow-ups → Strategy approval → Copywriter → CopyPicker → Visual Artist (parallel) → Builder
Agent badges appear correctly on each phase's messages
Workspace persists across page refreshes (session resumes)
Gemini SVGs render in SvgPreview with animation
Final code renders in LandingCodePreview iframe with embedded SVGs
